page: cadence-rollup (multi-source: docs site, GitHub commits, daily_review.json, status_history.json)
description: Cadence rollup, 12.05h since prior 2026-05-04T23:06Z poll. NET QUIET on dome public surface — ALL 6 covered page hashes BYTE-IDENTICAL to prior poll AND to all polls back through 2026-04-19 (30th consecutive byte-identical predictions.html / ~16.46d): home cb47aab7d62a8380d7f15c35afc0d4db (64,441), wins 16d65a42722d2d5869842d14c8f699f0 (91,686), predictions 885cd58727130018764b14355b0aa785 (152,936), coordinates 5127700325dc0b2bf69a0eea7a94df06 (14,061), model 28cef1a65d65bf6a0a3b0f77458d203d (58,429), evolution 93f99dd70d6d52fbb5616cbc5fec5aa5 (9,638); ai-context still 404 baseline c1f9838a/9379. POLLER ARTIFACT NOTE: initial $(curl ...) shell capture stripped trailing bytes and produced spurious different hashes for all 6 pages; -o file fetches (the canonical method) showed all pages BYTE-IDENTICAL. Caveat documented to prevent future polls from misreporting based on shell-variable capture truncation. 9 commits since prior 23:06Z poll: 6 Auto-update ECM status (c2b7177 23:37Z, 13c1d43 01:20Z, c94bb3d 04:36Z, 1bb66d9 07:05Z, ede2d3d 09:18Z, 63b42b8 10:57Z) + 2 ECM data pull (e8610a2 01:47Z, 0cf84e9 07:52Z) + 1 daily AI review (c5e9dec 07:27Z = HOLD #14 fired). 0 manual commits. KEY FINDING #1: HOLD #14 FIRED at 2026-05-05T07:27:26Z (commit c5e9dec, daily AI review pipeline). docs/data/daily_review.json regenerated with generated_at=2026-05-05T07:27:26Z; registry counts UNCHANGED (confirmed=69, prospective=10, refined=4, registry_ratio_pct=94.5 — exact match to HOLDs #10/#11/#12/#13). Sustained-gate pattern (a) extends from 4 -> 5 consecutive HOLDs without registry update. The 04-23 hypothesis 'registry advancement is gated independent of HOLD cadence' is now stronger; pattern (b) 'imminent batched edit' would have required HOLD #14 to bring confirmed up to 70 or higher, which did not happen. KEY FINDING #2: MANUAL-COMMIT DROUGHT 17.96d / 431.10h. 18d threshold not yet crossed (will cross at 2026-05-05T12:02:38Z, ~54 minutes after this poll write); 32nd consecutive auto-only poll (was 31). Last manual a57e731 still 2026-04-17T12:02:38Z. KEY FINDING #3: ECLIPSE_DAYS DECREMENTED 99 -> 98 at 2026-05-05T00:00Z midnight UTC (between status_history entries 2026-05-04T23:37:51Z eclipse=99 and 2026-05-05T01:19:28Z eclipse=98). Cadence holds: 1-decrement-per-UTC-day at midnight, no within-day variation, exactly as predicted. tracking.html eclipse 'days remain' value also flipped 99 -> 98. KEY FINDING #4: 0 source-file SHA touches (monitor.py 9de912a8, scripts/pull_data.py aa0573fe, scripts/build_daily_review.py ceddb04f, inject_ai_layer.py 58996a0c, verify_predictions.py db947cab, generate_manifest.js 786842ed — all SHAs identical to prior 10+ polls). docs/ai_manifest.json git SHA ea66371b unchanged V51.1 last_updated=2026-04-17; docs/api/index.json byte-identical e00e85aa8907af40778096f9a138c2d6/4056 last_updated=2026-04-17 (git SHA 890fb607). KEY FINDING #5: Live status_history.json 567 entries via /predictions/data/status_history.json (was 561 prior poll; +6 from 6 Auto-update appends — exact match); latest entry 2026-05-05T10:57:30Z (matches commit 63b42b8 at 10:57:35Z); wins_confirmed=67 (67-vs-69 mismatch unchanged), version V51.0 (auto-pipeline internal counter unchanged). STEP 10b SILENT-IGNORE WATCH (9 PREDs in window): PRED-105 d=17.46 past 2026-04-18 close — verdict tacit_withdrawal locked; dome side: 30th consecutive byte-identical pred-105 entry on predictions.html (still PENDING/PROSPECTIVE label). PRED-077, -081, -085, -087, -088, -090, -106, -111 all at d=5.46 past close; predictions.html byte-identical confirms ZERO post-closure adjudication across all 8 polls / ~131h post-close; no commit messages reference any PRED-NNN identifier; SEVERITY MEDIUM per Step 10b day-4-7 rule (chg-20260504-1106-002 dedicated stands; no new dedicated chg-* this poll). Next band transition (day-8+ HIGH) at 2026-05-08T00:00Z (~2.54d from now). Title still verbatim 'Ovoid Cavity Cosmological Model V51.1 — 69 Confirmed Registry Items'; confirmed=69, accuracy=94.5%, V51.1 unchanged; refined=4. Parameters baseline-clean (byte-identical model.html confirms 20015/8537/5733/2534 unchanged). Repo description still null. Canary OTS-provenance trap UNCHANGED — same 4 pre-existing .ots files (fd9d0a8d, 411ec05e, 5b9478e4, 3d3df225); no new prediction-isolation file; weekly_predictions_2026-03-15.json STILL no .ots companion (~7+ weeks). Content-security sweep clean (0 prompt-injection phrases on any of 6 pages, 0 hidden-CSS anomalies). Author-contact prior NOT invoked — zero published-surface change to attribute. INFRASTRUCTURE OBSERVATION: tracking.html (NOT a covered page) updated by HOLD #14 + data pull cadence: AAO 7d -0.368σ -> -0.285σ (still negative, opposite of dome's +0.3σ prediction); Tomsk amp 0.074 -> 0.098; Alerts 48h 3 -> 8; AAO row date rolled 2026-05-04 -> 2026-05-05; row 'suppressed' class dropped. Initial diff vs c5e9dec intermediate state showed apparent row REMOVALS but the subsequent 0cf84e9 (07:52Z data pull) re-added them with new May-5-rolled values; current state delta vs prior poll is normal day-rollover, not data scrubbing.
before: Prior poll 2026-05-04T23:06Z: HOLD #13 fired earlier (08:03Z May 4); manual drought 17.46d / 419.06h (17d threshold crossed); 31 consecutive auto-only polls; status_history.json 561 entries; eclipse_days=99 (within May 4 UTC); 6/6 page hashes baseline; 4-event manual-approval-gate streak; HOLD #14 anticipated at ~2026-05-05T07:30Z.
after: Now 2026-05-05T11:09Z: HOLD #14 fired at 07:27Z (registry unchanged, gate streak 4 -> 5); manual drought 17.96d / 431.10h (18d threshold pending at 12:02:38Z, ~54 min from now); 32 consecutive auto-only polls; status_history.json 567 entries; eclipse_days=98 (decremented at 2026-05-05T00:00Z midnight UTC, cadence holds); 6/6 page hashes still baseline (30th consecutive byte-identical predictions.html / ~16.46d).
git_commit: no manual; 9 auto commits this window (6 Auto-update + 2 ECM data pull + 1 daily AI review = HOLD #14)
hold_14_observation: HOLD #14 fired 2026-05-05T07:27:26Z (commit c5e9dec, 'auto: daily AI review'). daily_review.json regenerated; registry counts (69/10/4/94.5%) match HOLDs #10-#13 exactly. Pattern (a) 'sustained gate without registry advancement' extends from 4 to 5 consecutive events. Pattern (b) 'imminent batched edit' would have predicted confirmed climbing to 70+; this did not happen. Tracking.html received normal day-rollover updates (AAO drift, eclipse days 99->98, date rolls).
eclipse_days_observation: ECLIPSE_DAYS decremented 99 -> 98 at 2026-05-05T00:00Z midnight UTC. Cadence (1-decrement-per-UTC-day at midnight) holds. Within-day variation: zero. Cross-checked across status_history.json entries 2026-05-04T23:37:51Z (eclipse=99) and 2026-05-05T01:19:28Z (eclipse=98). tracking.html 'days remain until August 12, 2026 eclipse test' value also flipped 99 -> 98. No anomaly.
poller_artifact_note: Initial bash $(curl ...) variable-capture for the 6 covered pages produced phantom different hashes (~3-86 bytes smaller per page, all 6 changing simultaneously after 29 byte-identical polls would have been an extraordinary signal). Curl -o file refetch confirmed BYTE-IDENTICAL state. Root cause: bash command substitution strips trailing newlines and may strip null bytes / non-printable characters. Future polls MUST use -o file (or stdin->md5sum without variable capture) to avoid this artifact. Documented here so a future poller doesn't re-flag spurious 'all pages changed' on the same artifact.
watch_for_next_poll: 8 April-EOM PREDs at d=5.96 still in MEDIUM band (no new dedicated chg-* needed); transition to day-8+ HIGH at 2026-05-08T00:00Z (~2.04d after next poll)
